name: @ondewo/survey-client-nodejs
description: ONDEWO Survey (SURVEY) Client library for Nodejs
author: ONDEWO GmbH <office@ondewo.com>

scripts.pretest:auth: tsc auth/offlineTokenProvider.ts auth/offlineTokenProvider.spec.ts --ignoreConfig --module commonjs --target es2020 --strict --lib es2020,dom --skipLibCheck --sourceMap --types node --typeRoots ./node_modules/@types --outDir .test-build
scripts.pretest:examples: tsc examples/listSurveysExample.ts examples/listSurveysExample.spec.ts --ignoreConfig --module commonjs --target es2020 --strict --lib es2020,dom --skipLibCheck --sourceMap --types node --typeRoots ./node_modules/@types --outDir .test-build
scripts.test: npm run test:auth && npm run test:examples
